body.title: agent_datacenter: move CC chat history to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/
body.result: export_chat.py default → ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/; files moved; symlink from old path; verified writing to new location
body.description:
CC chat history (JSON + text exports) lives in ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/ but belongs in the central log tree under the CC.0 comms channel. Move existing files to ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/, update export_chat.py output path, update the T-chat-history-igor-backfill gate reference.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/export_chat.py (output path constant), ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/ (new dir — created by T-adc-ops-log-tree), ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs/ (source — mv + optional symlink for old references)
**Design rules:** none apply directly
**Scope boundary:** IN: update export_chat.py path, move existing files, optional symlink from old location. OUT: changing log format, Igor's backfill job (it will pick up new path automatically once export_chat.py is updated)
**Test plan:** Run export_chat.py after change, verify output lands in ~/.agent_datacenter/logs/CC.0/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Old symlink resolves if present.
